calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2016 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay Of, And Failure To Prosecute (C.C.P. 583.410)
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS BENATTAR MARBLE & GRANIKTE INC. AND MOSHE BENATTAR'S Motion To Dismiss For Delay Of, And Failure To Prosecute (C.C.P. 583.410) is denied. The notice of motion was filed June 3, 2016, but CRC 3.1342(a) requires that it be filed at least 45 days before the hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-12-2016 Continued To Jul-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Jan-29-2016 Continued To May-23-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JAMES D. RUSH, ESQ. of the Law Offices of James D. Rush, APC, Tel No. 415-897-4801 appearing telephonically for the moving party;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. JAMES D. RUSH, ESQ'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR JAMES PORTER is granted. Counsel to prepare and submit a judicial council order to the court for signature. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
